title: Hardcore Kingdoms
description: The Vanilla+ Modpack Kota uses in his Hardcore Minecraft series
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WVI8SQIajB0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A Vanilla Friendly modpack aimed at improving visual aspects of the game and certian QoL improvements.

### Features
- Visual improvements for a more immersive experience
- Environmental enhancements like better weather and sounds
- Inventory solutions that manage the games UI better
- Technical mods that improve rendering and playing experience

*As seen in my Hardcore Series!*

This is a vanilla friendly modpack that reflects the mods I use in my Hardcore series. The only omissions from the pack are things like Axiom, Flashback, and other content creation related mods. The pack also includes my shaders and the config folder for them, so the settings should match up with what I use. Enjoy!


https://vanillatweaks.net/
